query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.productLane,
  p.priority,
  p.sector,
  p.projectState,
  p.lifecycleStatus,
  p.stageCode,
  p.owner,
  p.completion,
  p.value,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' AND c.crmOrphan = 0 THEN 1 END) AS sr_contacts,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.crmOrphan = 0 THEN 1 END) AS total_contacts
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.priority IN ('hot','tier1')
  AND (p.projectState IN ('NSW','VIC','SA','TAS') OR p.projectState IS NULL OR p.projectState = 'NATIONAL')
  AND (p.productLane IN ('portable_air','multi_lane_pt') OR p.productLane IS NULL)
  AND p.lifecycleStatus NOT IN ('archived','completed')
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.productLane, p.priority, p.sector, p.projectState, p.lifecycleStatus, p.stageCode, p.owner, p.completion, p.value
ORDER BY sr_contacts DESC, p.value DESC
LIMIT 15;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.productLane,
  p.priority,
  p.sector,
  p.projectState,
  p.lifecycleStatus,
  p.stageCode,
  p.owner,
  p.completion,
  p.value,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' AND c.crmOrphan = 0 THEN 1 END) AS sr_contacts,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.crmOrphan = 0 THEN 1 END) AS total_contacts
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.priority IN ('hot','tier1')
  AND (p.projectState IN ('NSW','VIC','SA','TAS') OR p.projectState IS NULL OR p.projectState = 'NATIONAL')
  AND (p.productLane IN ('portable_air','multi_lane_pt') OR p.productLane IS NULL)
  AND p.lifecycleStatus NOT IN ('archived','completed')
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.productLane, p.priority, p.sector, p.projectState, p.lifecycleStatus, p.stageCode, p.owner, p.completion, p.value
ORDER BY sr_contacts DESC, p.value DESC
LIMIT 15;
